channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Breaking Down Barriers: Researchers Develop Algorithm to Ease Skill Transfer Between Robots
item.description: Researchers at UC Berkeley introduce RoVi-Aug, a framework that enables the transfer of skills across different robots, overcoming traditional training limitations.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Cisco, NTT Data partner to simplify private 5G connectivity
item.description: Cisco and NTT Data are extending their partnership to offer customers more streamlined options for deploying private 5G services for enterprise connectivity. The partnership ties Cisco’s networking technologies to NTT Data’s Transatel network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Instagram's Threads Sees Surge in Users Amid X Exodus
item.description: Meta's Instagram sees significant growth in users on Threads as thousands leave X due to concerns over toxic environment and politics.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Revolutionizing HR and payroll: Strategies for a modern workforce
item.description: Learn how agencies are innovating their payroll services to meet evolving needs The post Revolutionizing HR and payroll: Strategies for a modern workforce first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: TikTok Influencer Arrested for Shoplifting After Live-Streaming Thefts on Social Media
item.description: Florida influencer Marlena Velez, who goes by @marlenavelezz on TikTok, was arrested and charged with petty theft after live-streaming a haul of allegedly stolen Target goods to her 350,000 followers.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Nvidia Unveils AI Model for Music and Audio Generation - Fugatto Technology in Focus
item.description: Nvidia reveals new AI model Fugatto, generating music and audio from text prompts, with potential applications in film, video games, and music production.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: PHP updates DOM API
item.description: PHP 8.4.1, an update to the longstanding server-side web scripting language, has been released with features including an updated DOM API that makes it easier to work with HTML5 documents. Accessible from php.net, PHP 8.4.1 was released November 21.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 3 data engineering trends riding Kafka, Flink, and Iceberg
item.description: Apache Kafka, Apache Flink, and Apache Iceberg are among the most popular technologies in the data ecosystem.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DARPA tries a simple but profound concept to improve cybersecurity
item.description: "This idea of compartmentalization has a realization by breaking systems up into small pieces," said Howard Strobe. The post DARPA tries a simple but profound concept to improve cybersecurity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: NetBox Labs launches tools to combat network configuration drift
item.description: NetBox Labs is expanding its network management platform this week with a pair of new products designed to tackle the growing challenges of infrastructure documentation and configuration management.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Comcast to spin off cable networks that were once the entertainment giant's star performers
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Comcast is spinning off into a new company many of the cable television networks that were once at the entertainment giant's heart as consumers increasingly swap out their cable TV subscriptions for streaming platforms.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: US gathers allies to talk AI safety as Trump's vow to undo Biden's AI policy overshadows their work
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has vowed to repeal President Joe Biden's signature artificial intelligence policy when he returns to the White House for a second term. What that actually means for the future of AI technology remains to be seen.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Meta's Threads app launches custom feeds amid Bluesky surge
item.description: The rollout came just days after Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced last week that Threads was testing the new feature.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Cisco: Pressure to deploy AI is up, but only 13% feel ready
item.description: Pressure to implement AI plans is on the rise, but the readiness of enterprise networks to handle AI workloads has actually declined over the past year, according to new research from Cisco.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Australia won't force social media users to share their personal details when child ban takes effect
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia's communications minister said Wednesday the government won't force social media users to hand over their personal information to tech companies, as children younger than 16 are set to be banned from the platforms.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Azure AI Foundry tools up for changes in AI applications
item.description: The way we use artificial intelligence is changing. Chatbots aren’t going away. We’ll continue to use them to deliver basic, natural language, self-service applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Kotlin for Java developers: Classes and coroutines
item.description: Java is one of the classic object-oriented languages, so classes and objects are of special interest to Java developers. Object-oriented programming gives you considerable power, particularly when it comes to structuring and organizing programs as they grow larger.
item.dc:creator: Info World
